name: TransformationPlane
summary: The TransformationPlane class describes a transformation from global model coordinates to local and back to global.

constructors.name: TransformationPlane()
constructors.summary: Creates a new identity transformation using the global coordinate system.

constructors.name: TransformationPlane(CoordinateSystem)
constructors.summary: Creates a new transformation plane defined by the given coordinate system.

params.name: CoordinateSystem
params.doc: The coordinate system to be used.

constructors.name: TransformationPlane(Point, Vector, Vector)
constructors.signature: public TransformationPlane(Point Origo, Vector Xvector, Vector Yvector)
constructors.summary: Creates a new transformation plane defined by the given origin and two vectors.

params.name: Xvector
params.doc: The X vector to be used.

params.name: Yvector
params.doc: The Y vector to be used.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a string representation of the matrices that transform to local and global coordinates.

returns.doc: A string representation of the matrices that transform to local and global coordinates.

properties.name: TransformationMatrixToGlobal
properties.summary: Gives a transformation matrix for converting local points in the transformation plane to global coordinates.

properties.name: TransformationMatrixToLocal
properties.summary: Gives a transformation matrix for converting points in the global plane to local coordinates in the transformation plane.
